framework.name: Shared LLM Vulnerability Hypothesis
framework.description: When all agents in a multi-agent system use the same LLM, they inherit shared weaknesses that can cause system-wide failures or create vulnerabilities to adversarial attacks. Homogeneity in the reasoning substrate creates systemic risk.
framework.raw_quote: When they're built using the same LLM, for example, they can experience shared weaknesses. Such weaknesses might cause a systemwide failure of all involved agents or expose vulnerability to adverse attacks
